title: Alot of Items
description:
A'lot of items is a mod that adds more items, combat, doors, and even more building blocks!

 

(Doors coming soon)

 

This mod adds:
- A full selection of colored Planks & Wood

- More bricks

etc.
body:
Alot of items is a mod that adds more items, combat, doors, and even more building blocks!

 

(Doors coming soon)

 

This mod adds:

- A full selection of colored Planks & Wood

- More bricks

 

Plans:
- Doors & Trapdoors

- Saplings/ Trees

- More Planks & bricks

- Better textures
